html:
2026-0599
2026-06-12GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of Korea on the Protection of Military and Defence Classified Information, done at Ottawa on 25 February 2026.Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of Korea on the Protection of Military and Defence Classified Information.N/A
subject: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of Korea on the Protection of Military and Defence Classified Information, done at Ottawa on 25 February 2026.
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of Korea on the Protection of Military and Defence Classified Information.
